scripts.build:s0-s3: pnpm --filter @singularity/authorization build && pnpm --filter @singularity/contracts build && pnpm --filter @singularity/kernel-client build && pnpm --filter @singularity/database build && pnpm --filter @singularity/object-store build && pnpm --filter @singularity/api build && pnpm --filter @singularity/worker build && pnpm --filter @singularity/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm verify:protyle-platform && pnpm verify:protyle-boundary && pnpm verify:protyle-vite-closure && eslint apps/web packages/protyle-browser/src --config eslint.config.mjs --max-warnings=0

scripts.test: pnpm test:architecture && pnpm --filter @singularity/protyle-browser test && pnpm --filter @singularity/web test && pnpm test:app
scripts.test:s0-s3: pnpm --filter @singularity/contracts test && pnpm --filter @singularity/database test:integration && pnpm --filter @singularity/object-store test && pnpm --filter @singularity/api test && pnpm --filter @singularity/worker test && pnpm --filter @singularity/web test:space-access && pnpm --filter @singularity/web test:browser-integration
scripts.typecheck:s0-s3: pnpm --filter @singularity/authorization typecheck && pnpm --filter @singularity/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @singularity/kernel-client typecheck && pnpm --filter @singularity/database typecheck && pnpm --filter @singularity/object-store typecheck && pnpm --filter @singularity/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @singularity/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @singularity/web typecheck
scripts.verify:b4: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.verify:s0-s3: pnpm lint:s0-s3 && pnpm typecheck:s0-s3 && pnpm test:s0-s3 && pnpm build:s0-s3
